title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: User taps "Skip" on the Organized onboarding page, then taps "Continue" to navigate to the POLY LENS Login screen with Login and Continue as Guest options.
steps: 1. Start onboarding and navigate to the Organized page.
2. Observe the 'Continue' button displayed on the Organized page.
4. Observe the Organized page is shown again with a 'Continue' button and text about Poly Lens location tracking.
6. Observe the POLY LENS Login screen with 'Login' and 'Continue as Guest' buttons.
expected: After tapping 'Skip', the Organized page is displayed with a 'Continue' button and text about Poly Lens location tracking. After tapping 'Continue', the POLY LENS Login screen appears with 'Login' and 'Continue as Guest' buttons.
